name: Procare Solutions Childcare Management API
what_it_does: Procare Solutions REST API for childcare center and daycare management platform. Enables AI agents to manage child enrollment and records, handle billing and tuition collection, track attendance and check-in/check-out security, manage licensing compliance data, process family communication, access staff scheduling, and integrate childcare operations with external payment and reporting systems.
use_cases: Managing child enrollment and family records from childcare administration agents
Processing tuition billing and payment plans from billing automation agents
Tracking attendance and secure check-in/check-out from safety compliance agents
Generating licensing compliance reports from regulatory documentation agents
not_for: K-12 schools without early childhood care billing and licensing
After-school programs without full childcare center management
Large healthcare networks without childcare-specific workflows
best_when: A childcare center, preschool, or childcare franchise using Procare wants AI agents to automate enrollment processing, tuition billing, attendance tracking, and licensing compliance documentation.
avoid_when: COPPA+PRIVACY: Children's data is subject to COPPA protections. Child attendance, photo, and identification data is highly sensitive and subject to state childcare licensing regulations.

auth.notes: Procare uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Center-level credentials. Partner program for technology integrations. Scopes control access to child records, billing, and attendance data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — childcare management enterprise SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-center pricing; enterprise contracts for childcare chains and franchises
pricing.notes: Denver, Colorado company. Founded 1992. Veteran childcare management platform. 37,000+ child care programs. Strong in franchised childcare chains (Kindercare, La Petite Academy). Also offers Procare Connect app for parents.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: COPPA: Children's records are subject to COPPA and state childcare licensing regulations
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
Child check-in/check-out security data is safety-critical — implement strict access controls
US data residency only — verify for international childcare chains
State childcare licensing requirements vary widely — understand regulatory context
Franchised childcare chain data requires franchise-level authorization structure
agent_readiness.security_notes: COPPA: Children's personal data including attendance and billing. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with center-level scoping. US data residency only. Child safety and licensing compliance critical.

security_score_components.security_notes: Children's data subject to COPPA. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US data residency only. Child safety compliance required.
